content.text: REVIEW-PASS: 5.1.1(ii) — Both usage strings are specific and tied to visible features: NSCameraUsageDescription matches ReceiptScannerView.swift's camera capture for receipts (Info.plist:7-8, ReceiptScannerView.swift:14), and NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription describes the Export-to-photos flow (Info.plist:9-10).
